metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, four-lens parallel staff-review, diff-focused security + a11y reviews (with per-diff early-exit on docs-only PRs), agent-isolated planner + docs helpers, project-config-driven ship + ship-spike pipelines with stale-base preflight gate. v1.2.2 adds consumer dogfood-readiness: /flow:doctor verification skill, template/base/bootstrap.sh one-command scaffolder, docs/first-pr.md walkthrough, and a fully-refreshed README + CLAUDE.md.template.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic), the four-lens parallel staff-review (engineer / UX-designer / design-engineer / push-further), diff-focused /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review, /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike pipelines, /flow:workflow-help, /flow:doctor verification skill, planner + docs context-isolation agents, portable rules (general, plan-discipline, documentation, exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (16 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.2 adds consumer dogfood-readiness: /flow:doctor punch-list verification, template/base/bootstrap.sh one-command scaffolder, docs/first-pr.md step-by-step walkthrough, and a fully-refreshed README + CLAUDE.md.template explaining the enforcement mechanism (auto-loading rules + skill triggers + /flow:ship Step 1.0 assumption surface).
